General.Name: TK Group(Holdings)Ltd
General.Description: TK Group (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture, sale, subcontracting, fabrication, and modification of molds and plastic components. The company operates in two segments: Mold Fabrication and Plastic Components Manufacturing. It provides precision, high performance, special decoration, and medical molding products. The company also offers tooling solutions, including medical, packing, personal care, electronic, automotive, home appliance, and special molds. In addition, it offers consumer electronics, including headphones, AR glasses, and game controllers; smart home products, such as speakers and family tablets; medical devices; personal care products, including electric toothbrushes, beauty instruments, and neck massagers; electronic atomizers; automotive products, such as car dashboards, dashboard brackets, fenders, and air filters; commercial products, including video conference communication, and IP conference phones. The company serves customers in various markets, including mobile phones and wearable devices, automobiles, medical and personal healthcare, commercial telecommunications equipment, electronic atomizers, household electrical appliances, and others. It operates in the People's Republic of China, Southeast Asia, Hong Kong, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
